basic_details.job_title: RNU Akashvani Jalandhar Casual News Reader-cum-Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Candidates 21 to 50 years who have Graduate from a recognized University with proficiency in Punjabi language and typing, along with a good broadcasting voice, are eligible to apply for these Casual News Reader-cum-Translator (Punjabi) vacancies. The application process for RNU Akashvani Jalandhar Casual News Reader-cum-Translator (Punjabi) Recruitment 2026 has started on Not Mentioned and will remain open until 20 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Proficiency in Punjabi Language with Typing, Good quality voice suited for Broadcasting
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University. Proficiency in Punjabi Language with Typing. Good quality voice suited for Broadcasting.

selection_process: Written test for General Knowledge and current affairs as well as knowledge of Punjabi language Voice Test Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.newsonair.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RNU Akashvani Jalandhar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Casual News Reader-cum-Translator (Punjabi) post is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the News Reader-cum-Translator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university, possess proficiency in Punjabi language with typing skills, and have a good quality voice suitable for broadcasting.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Casual News Reader-cum-Translator (Punjabi) post is between 21 years and 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 354/- (inclusive of GST) for the General Category and Rs. 265.50/- (inclusive of GST) for SC/ST/OBC candidates per day.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test covering General Knowledge, current affairs, and Punjabi language, followed by a Voice Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 354/-, and SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 265.50/-.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article by clicking on the provided link for the Official Notification PDF.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
